market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated intraday volatility expected - positive 0DTE GEX provides short-term stability but net negative portfolio GEX amplifies directional moves once gamma flip breaks
outlook.summary: Market at critical inflection near gamma flip 658.6. Positive 0DTE GEX (+1.93B) suppresses immediate volatility while negative Weekly (-0.74B) and Monthly (-3.41B) GEX signal structural instability. Extreme PCR (4.01 Monthly) and bearish skew (1.65 ratio) indicate oversold conditions. Price trapped between resonance levels at 655 and 660 with massive volume activity (363K/306K). Break of either side triggers amplified move due to net negative total GEX.

levels.motivazione: Critical gamma pivot where dealer positioning flips. Spot testing this level - break determines intraday direction with high probability move.
Resonance across all 3 expiries. Massive 0DTE volume (306K, 40x OI ratio) indicates intense dealer hedging. Immediate resistance above spot.
Resonance support with highest 0DTE volume (363K, 36x OI ratio). Confluent with Weekly Max Pain - strong magnetic attraction zone.
0DTE Max Pain acting as primary price magnet. Strong PUT wall with 71K Monthly OI. Target if 655 support fails.
Monthly Max Pain above spot. Upside magnet if 660 CALL wall breaks. Target for mean reversion.
Secondary resistance with significant OI across all expiries. Monthly CALL OI 20.7K provides structural ceiling.
Structural support with massive PUT OI: Weekly 85K, Monthly 98K. Deep institutional hedging zone - major floor.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected. Positive aggregate GEX (1.28B) indicates dealer long gamma positioning, promoting mean reversion and pinning behavior near large OI strikes.
outlook.summary: Spot 588.5 is caught between major put support (580/570) and call resistance (590/595). Bearish volatility skew (1.72) and high PCR (1.78) indicate fear, but positive GEX suppresses volatility. Max Pain clusters (581/583/590) suggest MM targeting lower. Weekly Gamma Flip at 595.62 is overhead resistance. Expect range-bound pinning toward 590 into expiry.

levels.motivazione: Major resistance: 0DTE OI 11,114 + Weekly OI 6,196 CALL + Monthly OI 21,189 CALL. Massive volume confirms institutional interest. Primary MM pin target.
Weekly gamma flip at 595.62. Critical inflection point where dealer gamma changes sign. Spot below indicates resistance zone.
Consistent call resistance across all expiries: 0DTE OI 8,932 + Weekly OI 9,558 + Monthly OI 7,865. Aligns with Gamma Flip zone.
Major structural support: 0DTE OI 15,980 + Weekly OI 7,231 + Monthly OI 32,723 PUT. High volume (67,810) confirms defense.
Deep support confluence: 0DTE OI 17,231 + Weekly OI 9,158 + Monthly OI 40,450 PUT. Largest monthly put concentration.
0DTE Max Pain at 581.0 (1.3% below spot). MM target to minimize payouts. Near structural put wall at 580.
Monthly call wall OI 38,155 + Weekly OI 6,758 + 0DTE OI 4,291. Upside ceiling for swing moves.
Massive 0DTE volume (229,085 PUT). Spot-adjacent friction zone with active dealer hedging. Mixed OI creates pinning behavior.

0DTE gamma equilibrium below spot. Dealers long gamma here suppressing volatility. Spot (6648) above flip = mild bullish positioning.
